routes.summary: List API keys (hashes never returned).
Create an API key. The plaintext key is returned ONCE in this response.
Revoke an API key (soft — sets revoked_at).
List audit-log entries with pagination and entity/action/user/date filters.
Generate a Patreon OAuth authorization URL + state.
Patreon OAuth callback. Sets auth cookies, redirects to the frontend.
Email/password login. Sets auth cookies, returns the auth response.
Exchange a refresh token for fresh tokens. Sets new auth cookies.
Invalidate the current session token and clear auth cookies.
Invalidate every session for the current user and clear auth cookies.
Dev-only: mint an admin session when AUTOLOGIN_ADMIN_LOCALHOST and the caller is localhost.
Return the currently-authenticated user.
Re-sync the current user's Patreon membership from the Patreon API.
List all block-style templates (admin, cached).
Fetch a single block-style template.
Create a block-style template.
Update a block-style template.
Delete a block-style template.
List campaigns. Public published-only by default; admins passing all=true/status get the paginated admin list.
Fetch a published campaign by slug.
Dashboard donation summary.
List all donations with optional campaign/status filters.
List a campaign's donations.
Bulk status change / delete by id list.
Fetch a campaign by id (any status).
Create a campaign.
Update a campaign.
Delete a campaign.
List all social connections (credentials masked).
Create/update a connection's app credentials + publish settings.
Generate an OAuth authorization URL + state for a provider.
OAuth provider callback. Persists tokens, then redirects to admin settings.
Move a connection up/down in the manual sort order.
Fetch one connection (credentials masked). null when not found.
Update a connection (provider taken from the path).
Disconnect: clear tokens (keep app creds), stop cron, bust cache.
Admin dashboard stats (counts + recent activity + quick actions).
List all registered cron jobs.
Fetch a single cron job by name (null when unknown).
RSS 2.0 feed (application/rss+xml) of recent published posts.
List all uploaded fonts (with @font-face source URLs).
Upload a font (multipart, field "file"). Optional customId / familyName.
Delete a font (file + row).
List forms. Public published-only by default; admins passing all=true/status get the paginated admin list.
Fetch a published form by slug (with questions). Honors requiresAuth.
Aggregated public results for a form (when showResults is enabled).
Submit a form. Enforces requiresAuth, duplicate-submission, and required fields.
Export a form's submissions as CSV.
Bulk status change / delete by id list.
Fetch a form by id (with questions).
List a form's submissions.
Create a form (optionally with questions).
Update a form.
Add a question to a form.
Update a form question.
Delete a form question.
Delete a form.
Basic health check.
Detailed health check (DB + Redis latency, uptime, memory).
Readiness check (k8s).
Liveness check (k8s).
Public subscribe to a list by slug (double-opt-in aware).
Create a send job + recipients and kick the worker (returns 202).
List recent send jobs.
Fetch a send job status snapshot.
Paginated recipient list for a job (optional status filter).
Reset failed recipients → pending and re-kick the worker.
Cancel a send job.
Variable catalog for the template reference UI.
List all mail templates.
Create a mail template.
Render preview HTML for an in-progress block set with variables resolved.
Fetch a template (meta + block tree).
Update template metadata.
Delete a template.
Replace a template's whole block tree (transactional).
List all mailing lists.
Create a mailing list.
Fetch a mailing list.
Update a mailing list.
Delete a mailing list.
Paginated subscriber list (optional search/status filters).
Add a subscriber (force confirmed). Idempotent: re-add reactivates.
Update a subscriber.
Remove a subscriber.
Bulk-delete subscribers by id list.
Flip a pending subscriber to subscribed.
Upload a single file (multipart, field "file"; optional alt/caption).
Upload a file for a content block (multipart, field "file"; postId/blockId).
Upload multiple files (multipart, field "files", max 10).
Paginated media list (type/types/search/sort filters).
Fetch a media item by id.
Update media metadata (title/alt/caption).
Delete a media item (removes files from storage).
Submit a contact message. Sanitizes input and notifies admins by email.
List contact messages with optional status/search filters.
Bulk status change / delete by id list.
Bulk update message status.
Bulk delete messages by id list.
Fetch a message by id (marks unread → read).
Update a message's status.
Delete a message.
Main navigation tree.
The page flagged as homepage (with blocks).
Fetch a page by slug. Gated content yields CONTENT_LOCKED with a preview in error.details.
List pages (any status) with filters.
Bulk status change / soft-delete by id list.
List a page's saved revisions.
Fetch one revision snapshot.
Restore a revision (snapshots current state first).
Create a page block.
Reorder a page's blocks within one parent.
Update a page block.
Delete a page block.
Fetch a page by id (any status, with blocks).
Create a page.
Update a page. Snapshots a revision first.
Delete a page.
Create or retrieve the logged-in user's Stripe customer.
Create a donation payment intent (anonymous donations allowed).
Start a subscription for the logged-in user.
Cancel the user's active subscription at period end.
List the logged-in user's subscriptions.
List the logged-in user's transaction history.
Stripe webhook (raw body, signature-verified). Always 200 unless bad signature (400).
List all subscriptions (admin).
List all transactions (admin; type/status filters).
List a specific user's transactions (admin).
List all subscription plans (admin).
Create a subscription plan (creates a Stripe product + price).
Update a subscription plan (admin).
List active subscription plans (public subscribe page).
List posts. Public gate by default; admins passing status/sort get the all-statuses listing.
Full-text search over published posts.
Fetch a post by slug. Gated content yields CONTENT_LOCKED with a preview in error.details.
Bulk status change / soft-delete by id list.
Fetch a post by id (any status).
Create a post.
Update a post. Snapshots a revision first.
Delete a post.
List a post's saved revisions.
Fetch one revision snapshot.
Restore a revision (snapshots current state first).
Reorder a post's content blocks.
Global search over published, non-private content (posts, pages, campaigns).
Admin search across all content (posts, pages, users, campaigns, forms, messages), any status.
Public site settings projection (cached 600s).
All settings rows with last-editor metadata.
Update settings; feature toggles run the dependency cascade + lazy migrations.
Homepage hero settings (cached 600s).
Update homepage hero settings.
Site header settings (cached 600s).
Update site header settings.
Admin chrome appearance tokens (operator-only).
Update admin chrome appearance tokens.
Site footer settings (cached 600s).
Update site footer settings.
Site branding (logo / favicon) settings (cached 600s).
Update site branding settings.
Public appearance settings (cached 600s).
Update appearance settings.
Site color swatches (cached 600s; auto-migrates legacy shape).
Replace the site color swatch palette.
Count swatch:{id} references across the DB (delete-confirm UI).
Permanently remove a feature: drop its tables + data. Irreversible.
Upsert an arbitrary settings row by key.
Delete an arbitrary settings row by key.
Installation state (whether the instance still needs setup).
Test a PostgreSQL connection (setup-only).
Test a Redis connection (setup-only).
Test SMTP credentials (setup-only).
Test S3 credentials (setup-only).
Generate a random JWT secret (setup-only).
Run the installer, then restart into running mode (responds before restart).
List products. Public active-only by default; admins passing all=true/status get the paginated admin list.
Fetch a product by slug with full nested detail. Public active-only; admins can preview=admin for any status.
Bulk status change / delete products by id list.
Fetch a product by id with full nested detail (any status).
Create a product with its options/variants/media/taxonomy.
Update a product and (when supplied) its structure/taxonomy.
Delete a product.
List all categories (flat; tree via parentId).
Fetch a category by slug with its active products.
Create a category.
Update a category.
Delete a category.
List collections. Public published-only; admins passing all=true get every collection.
Fetch a collection by slug with its curated active products.
Create a collection (productIds set membership).
Update a collection (productIds reset membership).
Delete a collection.
Distinct product tag list.
List a product's approved reviews (public), paginated (newest or most-helpful).
Submit a product review (user tier). Created pending for moderation.
Increment a review's helpful count.
List reviews for moderation (any status; filter by status/productId).
Moderate a review (approve/reject); recomputes the product rating.
Delete a review; recomputes the product rating if it was approved.
Preview checkout totals (subtotal/shipping/tax) without creating an order.
Place an order: validate the cart, create a pending order + Stripe PaymentIntent, return the client secret.
List orders. Regular users see their own (by user_id/email); admins see all. Paginated.
Fetch an order by its human order number (public confirmation view; limited fields for anonymous callers).
Resolve a token-gated digital download to a file URL (public; unguessable token is the guard).
Fetch an order by id with items. Users see their own; admins see any.
Update an order (admin): status/fulfillment/tracking/notes. Transition to refunded issues a Stripe refund.
Re-send the order receipt email (admin).
Storefront shop settings: appearance + a safe subset of config (currency, store/tax flags). No secret keys.
Full shop settings + appearance (admin).
Update shop settings and/or appearance (admin); merges the partial and returns the full config.
sitemap.xml (application/xml) of published content.
Drop the cached sitemap, rebuild, and return the URL count.
List stored social posts (optionally filtered by platform).
Live feed across connected providers (API-cached, no DB).
Live feed for one platform.
Posts selected for the homepage (falls back to latest per platform).
Set the homepage social post selection.
Sync social posts from one or all platforms.
Delete a stored social post by id.
List stored posts for one platform with search/sort.
Unsubscribe from a mailing list (raw HTML page).
Resubscribe to a mailing list (raw HTML page).
Confirm a double-opt-in subscription (raw HTML page).
List users with search/role/status filters and sorting.
List active bans.
Remove a ban by id.
Ban an IP address.
Fetch a user with Patreon membership.
Create a user (email/password credential).
Update a user.
Upload a user avatar (resized to 256×256 webp).
Set a user's password.
Ban a user.
Unban a user.
Permanently delete a user (orphans authored content, audit-logged).
